title: Plasmid mini-prep recipe v3 (column-based)
description:
Bench card for the column mini-prep.

Reagents per 5 mL overnight:
- P1 resuspension: 250 µL (4 °C, w/ RNase A)
- P2 lysis: 250 µL (RT, fresh)
- N3 neutralization: 350 µL (RT)
- PB wash: 500 µL
- PE wash: 750 µL (with ethanol)
- EB elution: 30 µL (pre-warm to 50 °C)

Steps:
1. Pellet 5 mL overnight @ 3000 g, 5 min, RT. Decant.
2. Resuspend in P1, transfer to 1.5 mL tube.
3. Add P2, invert 4 to 6×, incubate 3 min.
4. Add N3, invert 4 to 6×, spin 13k rpm, 10 min.
5. Load supernatant onto column, spin 60 sec.
6. Wash PB (60 sec), wash PE (60 sec), dry-spin 60 sec.
7. Elute in 30 µL EB, sit 1 min, spin 60 sec.

Expected yield: 80 to 150 ng/µL for FakeYeast-001 strains.
Lowercase ID: alex_mp_v3.
